mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FRIEND_MESSAGE ( MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, FRIEND_USER_ID, MESSAGE, READ_YN, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{userId}, #{friendId}, #{message}, #{readYN}, #{insertUserId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE MESSAGE = #{message}, READ_YN = #{readYN}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{updateUserId}

INSERT INTO FRIEND_INFO ( USER_ID, FRIEND_USER_ID, USER_NICKNAME, FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME, AVAIL_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{friendUserId}, #{userNickname}, #{friendUserNickname}, #{availStatus} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE USER_NICKNAME = #{userNickname}, FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME = #{friendUserNickname}, AVAIL_STATUS = #{availStatus}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, FRIEND_USER_ID, USER_NICKNAME, FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME, AVAIL_STATUS FROM FRIEND_INFO WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND AVAIL_STATUS = '02'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FRIEND_INFO WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND AVAIL_STATUS = '02'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FRIEND_INFO WHERE FRIEND_USER_ID = #{userId} AND AVAIL_STATUS = '01'
